input.name: Server folder refactor
input.overview: Consolidate org-next's over-abstracted server layer into a simpler, dashboard-inspired pattern: one file per domain exporting `createServerFn` directly, remove `.functions.ts` naming, move inline server fns out of routes, create a hooks directory, and fix imports throughout.
input.plan:
# Server Folder Refactor

## Current Problems

The server layer has unnecessary indirection. Each domain has 2-3 files: a plain async "logic" file, a `.functions.ts` file wrapping it in `createServerFn`, and sometimes a `.server.ts` file for server-only operations. Additionally, several route files define `createServerFn` inline rather than importing from `server/`.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph current ["Current: Over-Abstracted"]
        Route["Route (inline serverFn)"]
        FunctionsFile["campaigns.functions.ts\n(createServerFn)"]
        DomainFile["campaigns.ts\n(plain async)"]
        ServerFile["tenants.server.ts\n(plain async)"]
        OrgApi["orgApi.server.ts"]
        Route --> FunctionsFile
        FunctionsFile -->|"dynamic import"| DomainFile
        DomainFile --> OrgApi
        ServerFile --> OrgApi
    end
```

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph target ["Target: Simplified"]
        Route2["Route loader"]
        DomainFile2["campaigns.ts\n(createServerFn exports)"]
        OrgApi2["orgApi.server.ts"]
        Hook["hooks/useCreateCampaign.ts"]
        Component["CreateCampaignModal"]
        Route2 --> DomainFile2
        DomainFile2 --> OrgApi2
        Component --> Hook
        Hook --> DomainFile2
    end
```

## Phase 1: Consolidate `server/campaigns`

Merge [`src/server/campaigns.functions.ts`](apps/org-next/src/server/campaigns.functions.ts) into [`src/server/campaigns.ts`](apps/org-next/src/server/campaigns.ts). The resulting file exports `createServerFn` functions directly. Internal helpers (tenant scoping, bootstrap resolution) become non-exported functions.

**After refactor, `campaigns.ts` exports:**
- `listCampaigns` -- `createServerFn({ method: "GET" })`, no input
- `getCampaignDetail` -- `createServerFn({ method: "GET" })`, input: `{ campaignId }`
- `createCampaign` -- `createServerFn({ method: "POST" })`, input: `{ name }`
- `updateCampaign` -- `createServerFn({ method: "POST" })`, input: `{ campaignId, name }`

Each handler inlines the error handling pattern (OrgApiError 401 -> redirect to `/login`, Rollbar logging). No more dynamic `import()` -- direct calls to internal helpers.

**Delete:** `src/server/campaigns.functions.ts`

**Update imports in:**
- [`src/routes/_authed/campaigns/$campaignId.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/campaigns/$campaignId.tsx) -- change `getCampaignDetailPageDataFn` / `updateCampaignFn` to `getCampaignDetail` / `updateCampaign` from `@/server/campaigns`
- [`src/components/createCampaignModal.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/components/createCampaignModal.tsx) -- will use a hook instead (Phase 4)

## Phase 2: Consolidate `server/tenants`

Merge [`src/server/tenants.functions.ts`](apps/org-next/src/server/tenants.functions.ts) and [`src/server/tenants.server.ts`](apps/org-next/src/server/tenants.server.ts) into a single `src/server/tenants.ts`.

**After refactor, `tenants.ts` exports:**
- `createTenant` -- `createServerFn({ method: "POST" })`, input: `{ name, tenantType }`

The handler calls `postOrgApiJson` directly (no need for a separate `.server.ts` file since `postOrgApiJson` is already `createServerOnlyFn`).

**Delete:** `src/server/tenants.functions.ts`, `src/server/tenants.server.ts`

**Update imports in:**
- [`src/routes/_authed/organizations.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/organizations.tsx) -- `createTenantFn` becomes `createTenant` from `@/server/tenants`
- [`src/routes/_authed/workspace/new.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/workspace/new.tsx) -- same

## Phase 3: Move inline server fns out of routes

Three route files define `createServerFn` inline. Move them to `server/`:

### 3a: `_authed.tsx` -> `server/appBootstrap.ts`

[`src/routes/_authed.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed.tsx) defines `loadAuthedRouteFn` inline. Export it from [`src/server/appBootstrap.ts`](apps/org-next/src/server/appBootstrap.ts) as `getAppBootstrap` (a `createServerFn({ method: "GET" })`).

Keep `getAppBootstrapData` as a non-exported plain async helper (still used internally by `campaigns.ts`). The new `getAppBootstrap` wraps it with error handling (401 -> redirect to login).

The route loader becomes:

```typescript
loader: async ({ location }) => {
  const appBootstrap = await getAppBootstrap();
  // route-specific redirect logic stays in the route
  if (appBootstrap.user && !appBootstrap.tenant && !onWorkspaceNewRoute) {
    throw redirect({ to: "/workspace/new" });
  }
  return appBootstrap;
},
```

### 3b: `_authed/index.tsx` -> use `listCampaigns` from campaigns.ts

[`src/routes/_authed/index.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/index.tsx) defines `getDashboardPageDataFn` inline. Instead, the route loader should call `listCampaigns` from `server/campaigns.ts` directly. Card data (counts, placeholders) is derived in the component from the campaigns list.

### 3c: `workspace/new.tsx` -> `server/appBootstrap.ts`

[`src/routes/_authed/workspace/new.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/workspace/new.tsx) defines `loadWorkspaceNewPageFn` inline. This calls `getAppBootstrapData` and checks if the user has a tenant. Replace with calling the new `getAppBootstrap` server fn and keeping the redirect logic in the route loader.

## Phase 4: Remove `server/dashboard.ts`

[`src/server/dashboard.ts`](apps/org-next/src/server/dashboard.ts) is a thin aggregator that calls `getAppBootstrapData` + `listCampaigns` and adds placeholder numbers. After Phase 3b, this file is unused.

**Delete:** `src/server/dashboard.ts`

## Phase 5: Create `hooks/` and extract component data fetching

Create `src/hooks/` directory per AGENTS.md.

**`src/hooks/useCreateCampaign.ts`** -- Extracts the mutation logic currently in [`src/components/createCampaignModal.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/components/createCampaignModal.tsx). Pattern follows the dashboard's hook style but for a mutation:

```typescript
import { useMutation } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { createCampaign } from "@/server/campaigns";

export function useCreateCampaign() {
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (data: { name: string }) =>
      createCampaign({ data }),
  });
}
```

Update `CreateCampaignModal` to use this hook instead of importing the server fn directly.

## Phase 6: Rename non-camelCase files

Per AGENTS.md: "New file names should always be camel case." Fix existing kebab-case files:

- `server/org-api-access-token.server.ts` -> `server/orgApiAccessToken.server.ts`
- `lib/org-api-scoped-path.ts` -> `lib/orgApiScopedPath.ts`
- `lib/campaign-api-scope.ts` -> `lib/campaignApiScope.ts`
- `components/app-header.tsx` -> `components/appHeader.tsx`
- `components/marketing-carousel.tsx` -> `components/marketingCarousel.tsx`
- `components/root-not-found.tsx` -> `components/rootNotFound.tsx`
- `components/ui/rating-star-icon.tsx` -> `components/ui/ratingStarIcon.tsx`

Update all imports referencing renamed files. Update corresponding test file names too (`lib/org-api-scoped-path.test.ts` -> `lib/orgApiScopedPath.test.ts`, etc.).

## Phase 7: Validate

Run `pnpm run validate` from the repo root to confirm lint, build, typecheck, and tests all pass.

## Final server/ structure

```
src/server/
  appBootstrap.ts          -- getAppBootstrap (createServerFn) + internal helper
  authSession.ts           -- auth session management (unchanged)
  campaigns.ts             -- listCampaigns, getCampaignDetail, createCampaign, updateCampaign
  campaigns.test.ts        -- updated tests
  env.server.ts            -- server-only env config (unchanged)
  error.ts                 -- OrgApiError (unchanged)
  orgApi.server.ts         -- HTTP client (unchanged)
  orgApiAccessToken.server.ts -- token resolution (renamed)
  rollbarServer.server.ts  -- Rollbar (unchanged)
  session.ts               -- cookie sessions (unchanged)
  tenants.ts               -- createTenant
```

**Deleted:** `campaigns.functions.ts`, `tenants.functions.ts`, `tenants.server.ts`, `dashboard.ts`, `org-api-access-token.server.ts`

todos.content: Merge campaigns.functions.ts into campaigns.ts, export createServerFn directly, delete campaigns.functions.ts
Merge tenants.functions.ts + tenants.server.ts into tenants.ts, delete both old files
Move inline server fns from _authed.tsx, _authed/index.tsx, workspace/new.tsx into server/ files
Delete server/dashboard.ts (logic absorbed by route + campaigns.ts)
Create src/hooks/ directory, add useCreateCampaign hook, update CreateCampaignModal
Rename kebab-case files to camelCase per AGENTS.md convention
Run pnpm run validate to confirm lint, build, typecheck, and tests pass
